formulas.name: Energy Balance Equation
formulas.variables: Energy Intake (food and drinks consumed), Energy Expenditure (physical activity, thermogenesis)
formulas.notes: Important for maintaining a healthy weight and preventing energy imbalances

formulas.name: Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) Formula
formulas.formula: BMR = (10 × Weight in kg) + (6.25 × Height in cm) - (5 × Age in years) + 5
formulas.variables: Weight in kg, Height in cm, Age in years
formulas.notes: Used to estimate energy expenditure at rest

formulas.name: Dehydration Formula
formulas.formula: Percent Dehydration = (Body Weight Loss / Initial Body Weight) × 100
formulas.variables: Body Weight Loss, Initial Body Weight
formulas.notes: Used to assess the degree of dehydration

formulas.name: Hypohydration Formula
formulas.formula: Percent Hypohydration = (Body Weight Loss / Initial Body Weight) × 100
formulas.variables: Body Weight Loss, Initial Body Weight
formulas.notes: Used to assess the degree of hypohydration

formulas.name: Energy Expenditure Formula
formulas.formula: Energy Expenditure = BMR + Thermic Effect of Food + Physical Activity Level
formulas.variables: BMR, Thermic Effect of Food, Physical Activity Level
formulas.notes: Used to estimate daily energy expenditure

formulas.name: Carbohydrate Loading Formula
formulas.formula: Carbohydrate Loading = (Total Daily Energy Expenditure / 4) + (Carbohydrate-Rich Foods)
formulas.variables: Total Daily Energy Expenditure, Carbohydrate-Rich Foods
formulas.notes: Used to maximize muscle glycogen stores before intense exercise

formulas.name: Protein Needs Formula
formulas.formula: Protein Needs = (Body Weight in kg × Activity Level) + (1-2 g/kg body weight)
formulas.variables: Body Weight in kg, Activity Level
formulas.notes: Used to determine protein requirements for optimal performance
